exploit_intelligence.summary: Of 19 watch list CVEs: 5 weaponized (KEV-confirmed: 39987, 32201, 34197, 34621, 33825), 1 functional (n8n -21858), 2 PoC (Thymeleaf pair -40477/-40478), 11 with no public exploit (Cisco quartet, wolfSSL pair, Spring AI quintet). No maturity escalations in last 24h.

vendor_advisory_flags.notes: Wiz Research used IDA MCP (AI-augmented reverse engineering) — different methodology than Mythos; disclosed 2026-04-28. Out of probable-self-scan scope (third-party Wiz credit, not internal AI scan). Noted for analyst review.

np_di_candidates.rationale: NP+DI fit (Zip Slip path traversal in HTTP-handled file upload). 2024 vintage CVE recently promoted to KEV (2026-04-28) — outside the 2026-onwards in-scope window, so analyst should decide whether to backfill or skip.
